summary: Initialized Phase 3-1 coordination foundation spec artifact set.
Captured internal repository and OMO-inspired evidence for Phase 3-1 scope.
Spec-reviewer passed and user approved Phase 3-1 spec; Phase 3-2 roadmap is preserved in the spec as deferred scope.
Created isolated worktree on branch work/20260508-phase3-coordination-foundation-d7f4 and verified baseline.
Worktree classified ready after bun install, bun test, and bun run typecheck passed.
Drafted and iteratively hardened Phase 3-1 execution plan.
Plan-checker approved and plan-challenger found no blocking risks after revisions.
Alignment ready: T00 through T06 are serial batches with locked ownership, mailbox, and verification evidence expectations.
Execution complete: T00 through T06 passed task review loops and execution-level verification; route to final-review.
Final review PASS; route to finish.
T00 started: bootstrapping provisional Phase 3 coordination artifacts (ownership.json, mailbox.jsonl, verification/T00.json).
Created provisional ownership.json with 40 entries covering all planned workflow artifacts, verification records T00-T06, helper/test files, and skill docs.
Created append-only mailbox.jsonl with 3 bootstrap records: ownership init status_update, T01 executor_handoff, and T01 evidence protocol status_update.
Created verification/T00.json with base Phase 2 fields, ownership_evidence (pre_registry_bootstrap), and security_trigger_evidence (not_triggered).
T00 completed: provisional Phase 3 coordination artifacts bootstrapped. T01+ can proceed under ownership/mailbox/evidence protocol.
T01 started: creating Phase 3 helper contract tests for src/hooks/workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts exports.

T01 completed: comprehensive Phase 3 helper contract test suite created. RED confirmed: helper module does not exist. Tests cover mailbox schema, ownership schema, mode/operation invariants, path constraints, OwnershipEvidenceSchema, SecurityTriggerEvidenceSchema, global path coverage, omitted-evidence detection, VerificationRecord passthrough, and purity assertion.
T02 started: implementing pure Phase 3 coordination helper module src/hooks/workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts using only zod import.

Created src/hooks/workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts with pure Zod schemas, enums, refinements, path helpers, validation wrappers, global path-coverage helper, and omitted-evidence helper. Only zod import.
bun test src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts.test.ts: 189 pass, 0 fail, 253 expect() calls. All T01 contract tests pass (GREEN). bun run typecheck passes clean.

T02 completed: pure Phase 3 coordination helper module implemented and verified. 189 tests pass, typecheck passes clean. Helper exports cover mailbox/ownership schemas, mode/operation invariants, path constraints, ownership evidence, security trigger evidence, global path-coverage, and omitted-evidence detection.

Fixed T02 quality findings: exclusive_write/sequenced_write now reject invalid non-task owner ids such as not-a-task unless orchestrator provenance is documented; OwnershipEvidenceSchema validates all evidence paths as exact repo-relative paths.
Post-quality-fix verification passed: bun test src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts.test.ts reported 196 pass, 0 fail, 260 expect() calls; bun run typecheck completed with no errors.

Ownership registry correction: src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts.test.ts converted from T01 exclusive_write to sequenced_write shared between T01 (own-T01-helper-test) and T02 (own-T02-helper-test-fix). T02 may update T01 tests only for reviewer-confirmed test defects; serial sequencing required.

T02 quality fix round 2: backslash-separated paths now rejected in isValidRepoRelativePath for ownership targets and all evidence path arrays. Helper-test conflict resolved with own-T02-helper-test-fix ownership entry.
Post-quality-fix-round-2 verification: 201 pass, 0 fail, 265 expect() calls. bun run typecheck clean.

T02 remaining findings fixed: isValidRepoRelativePath now rejects any leading drive prefix ^[A-Za-z]: including C:secret.ts/C:foo; read_only/shared_append owners now require task-like ids or orchestrator.
Post-quality-fix-round-3 verification: 207 pass, 0 fail, 271 expect() calls. bun run typecheck clean.
T03 started: creating Phase 3-1 skill markdown contract tests that will fail until T04 adds Phase 3-1 coordination content to skill docs.

Created src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts with 92 tests across 13 describe blocks covering mailbox lifecycle, ownership registry, hyperplan-lite, security triggers, strict-completion matrix, Phase 3-2 roadmap, and exclusions.

RED confirmed: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts reports 8 pass, 84 fail, 104 expect() calls. bun run typecheck passes clean. Tests fail as expected because skill docs lack Phase 3-1 coordination text that T04 will add.

T03 completed: Phase 3-1 skill markdown contract test suite created with 92 tests. RED confirmed (84 fail). Tests import canonical schemas for enum/status consistency. T04 must add Phase 3-1 coordination text to skill docs to make these tests pass.

Fixed T03 reviewer findings: added explicit ownership_evidence field checks, changed_files[].operation assertion, security_trigger_evidence field/decision assertions, durable mailbox/ownership paths, narrow Phase 3-1 canonical headings, stage-specific responsibility checks, path-only/glob-deferred checks, and stronger exclusion negative-context checks.
Post-review-fix verification: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts reports expected RED with 8 pass, 93 fail, 112 expect() calls; bun run typecheck exits cleanly.

Fixed second reviewer round: (1) added canonical mailbox field name assertions for all 11 fields; (2) added ownership registry/entry field name assertions for work_id, entries, and all 10 entry fields in plan and execute coordination sections; (3) added security_trigger_evidence notes assertion; (4) added ownership_evidence notes assertion; (5) added attribution method enum values and coverage status enum values assertions.

Post-second-review verification: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts reports expected RED with 8 pass, 100 fail, 119 expect() calls, 108 tests; bun run typecheck exits cleanly.
T04 started: updating existing skill docs with Phase 3-1 coordination contract content to pass phase3-coordination-contract tests.

Updated 5 skill markdown files with Phase 3-1 coordination contract sections: plan (canonical coordination reference, hyperplan-lite checklist), execute (execution ownership reference, ownership_evidence, security_trigger_evidence), pre-execute-alignment (ownership/conflict-sensitive batching), final-review (Phase 3-1 coordination checks), spec (security trigger identification, Phase 3-2 deferred).

GREEN confirmed: bun test src/__tests__/phase3-coordination-contract.test.ts reports 108 pass, 0 fail, 260 expect() calls. Phase 2 contract tests pass, helper tests pass (207 pass, 0 fail). bun run typecheck passes clean.

T04 completed: Phase 3-1 coordination contract content added to all five skill docs. All 108 contract tests pass (GREEN), Phase 2 regression tests pass, helper tests pass, typecheck clean. No new skill dirs or public stages introduced.

T04 reviewer findings addressed: Phase 2 test fix (stripPhase31Sections for Phase 3-1 section exclusion), mailbox handoff expectations in pre-execute-alignment, exact ownership mode/operation invariants in plan, ownership failure rules in final-review. All 451 tests pass, typecheck clean.

Ownership registry correction (second): added own-T04-phase2-test-fix for src/__tests__/phase2-artifact-state-contract.test.ts with owner T04, mode exclusive_write, scoped to Phase 2 compatibility test fix. T00 bootstrap correction on behalf of registry; T04 does not own ownership.json.
T05 started: creating opt-in current-work Phase 3 coordination artifact validation test and validating/finalizing T00 provisional artifacts against implemented schemas.

Created src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts with opt-in WORK_ID-gated validation for ownership.json, mailbox.jsonl, verification records T00-T05, and plan.md strict-completion matrix.
Validated ownership.json (43 entries) and mailbox.jsonl (15 records) against Phase 3 helper schemas. Both artifacts pass without modifications.
Created verification/T05.json with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence.

WORK_ID=20260508-phase3-coordination-foundation-d7f4 bun test src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts passes. All ownership, mailbox, verification records, and plan.md matrix validations succeed.

T05 completed: opt-in current-work Phase 3 coordination artifact validation test created. ownership.json and mailbox.jsonl validated/finalized against implemented helper schemas (no structural changes needed). verification/T05.json created. Test skips when WORK_ID unset.

Fixed T05 quality findings: strict-completion validation now parses actual plan.md matrix rows and requires exactly 11 approved criteria with canonical statuses; ownership validation now has table-driven key artifact coverage; verification evidence validation now rejects uncovered/conflict changed_files entries, missing actual_changed_files coverage, and operation allowance mismatches; T05 evidence mailbox count corrected to actual post-append count.

Fixed remaining T05 findings: current-work validation now fails unresolved ownership_entry_id references, target mismatches, invalid ownership entry status, disallowed operations, and missing/null ownership entry ids for changed files. Ownership table now covers every minimum T05 target listed in plan.md.
T06 started: final full regression, typecheck, scope-boundary verification, and evidence carrier confirmation for Phase 3-1.
bun test: 1036 pass, 36 skip, 0 fail, 2053 expect() calls across 29 files. bun run typecheck: tsc --noEmit clean. WORK_ID current-work validation: 28 pass, 493 expect() calls.

Scope boundary review confirmed: no new public workflow stage, no new skill directory, no per-worker worktree, no OS/distributed lock, no full OMO Team Mode, no raw ulw, no free agent chat, no runtime message broker, no git/fs runtime automation in helper, no glob ownership. Helper module imports only zod. Phase 3-2 roadmap items remain documented as deferred across all skill docs.

Evidence carrier locations confirmed: ownership_evidence in verification/<task_id>.json, security_trigger_evidence in verification/<task_id>.json, strict-completion matrix in plan.md (read-only) and final-review artifact. All locations documented in skill docs and validated by contract tests.

T06 completed: full regression (1036 pass), typecheck (clean), current-work validation (28 pass), scope boundary review (all exclusions confirmed), helper purity (zod-only imports), evidence carrier locations (documented). verification/T06.json created with ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence. Phase 3-1 coordination foundation execution is complete.

Fixed T06 review finding: current-work validation REQUIRED_VERIFICATION_TASKS now includes T06, so WORK_ID validation requires and validates verification/T06.json with base Phase 2 and Phase 3 ownership/security evidence.

Post-review-fix verification passed: WORK_ID current-work validation 28 pass, 526 expect() calls; no-WORK_ID skip 0 pass, 28 skip, 0 fail; bun test 1036 pass, 36 skip, 0 fail; bun run typecheck clean.

Ownership registry correction (third): added own-T06-current-work-test-fix for src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts with owner T06, mode sequenced_write, scoped to final-verification defect fixes. T05 entry converted to sequenced_write for serial sharing. T00 bootstrap correction; T06 does not own ownership.json.

T06 ownership compliance fixes: (1) T06.json changed_files cites own-T06-current-work-test-fix not T05 entry; (2) current-work test now verifies owner_task_id matches record task_id with orchestrator/shared_append/pre-registry exceptions; (3) ownership expectation table updated to sequenced_write for current-work test T05+T06.
Post-ownership-compliance-fix verification: WORK_ID current-work validation 28 pass, 574 expect() calls; no-WORK_ID skip 0 pass, 28 skip; bun test 1036 pass, 36 skip, 0 fail; bun run typecheck clean.
